## Public safety checklist

- [ ] No real tenant IDs, client secrets, client IDs, redirect URIs, or tokens.
- [ ] No company names, internal URLs, private project names, or personal data.
- [ ] Examples use generic namespaces such as `ExampleApp`.
- [ ] Graph/M365 examples are generic and do not reveal organization details.
